data.title: Kyodo Printing Co. Renews Defense Policy Against Large-scale Share Purchases
data.description:

Kyodo Printing Co., Ltd. ( (JP:7914) ) has provided an update.

Kyodo Printing Co., Ltd. has renewed its Policy on Defense against Large-scale Purchases of the Company’s Shares, following approval at its 145th Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders. This strategic move aims to strengthen the company’s defenses against potential takeovers, ensuring stability and continuity in its operations.

More about Kyodo Printing Co., Ltd.

Kyodo Printing Co., Ltd. operates in the printing industry and is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market. The company specializes in printing services and related solutions, focusing on maintaining its market position and defending against large-scale acquisitions.

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from RESOL HOLDINGS Co., Ltd. ( (JP:5261) ).

RESOL HOLDINGS Co., Ltd. has announced its relationship with its controlling shareholder, Mitsui Fudosan Co., Ltd., which holds 31% of its voting rights. Despite this significant shareholding, RESOL maintains its independence in business operations and decision-making, ensuring that transactions with Mitsui Fudosan are conducted at market prices to protect minority shareholders.

More about RESOL HOLDINGS Co., Ltd.

RESOL HOLDINGS Co., Ltd. operates in the hospitality and real estate industry, focusing on services such as hotel management and golf course operations. The company collaborates with Mitsui Fudosan Co., Ltd., which holds a significant share of voting rights, to enhance corporate value through business cooperation.

data.title: GTI Energy Secures A$4.5 Million for Resource Expansion
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

GTI Resources Ltd ( (AU:GTR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

GTI Energy Ltd has successfully raised A$4.5 million through a placement to sophisticated, professional, and institutional investors, with Snow Lake Energy acting as a cornerstone investor. This funding will support the company’s resource expansion and infill drilling at the Lo Herma project, enhancing its resource base and positioning it well in the growing U.S. nuclear power sector. The placement has attracted significant domestic and international institutional interest, and Snow Lake’s involvement will result in a 9.9% holding in GTI Energy, along with the right to appoint a director to the board. The funds will also be used for hydrogeological and metallurgical analysis, landholding costs, and general working capital.

More about GTI Resources Ltd

GTI Energy Ltd is a company operating in the uranium and nuclear energy sector, focusing on resource expansion and infill drilling projects. The company is involved in the development of its Lo Herma ISR uranium project, which is strategically located alongside Snow Lake Energy’s Pine Ridge project.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$9M

data.title: Ban Leong Technologies to Delist Following Epicsoft’s Cash Offer
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An announcement from Ban Leong Technologies Limited ( (SG:B26) ) is now available.

Ban Leong Technologies Limited has received approval for its voluntary delisting from the Singapore Exchange, following a conditional cash offer by Epicsoft Asia Pte. Ltd. This move marks a significant shift in the company’s market presence, as it no longer meets the Free Float Requirement, leading to the suspension of its shares’ trading. The delisting and acquisition process indicates a strategic realignment for Ban Leong, potentially impacting stakeholders and altering its operational dynamics within the industry.

More about Ban Leong Technologies Limited

Ban Leong Technologies Limited, incorporated in Singapore, operates in the technology sector, focusing on distributing IT and multimedia products. The company is known for providing a wide range of technological solutions and services, catering to various market needs.

data.title: Torque Metals Launches Strategic Drilling at Paris Gold Project
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium for 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

An update from Torque Metals Ltd. ( (AU:TOR) ) is now available.

Torque Metals Ltd. has announced the commencement of a significant drilling campaign at its Paris Gold Project, targeting multiple Down Hole Electromagnetic (DHEM) conductors associated with high-grade gold zones. The campaign, which involves 6,500 meters of reverse circulation drilling, is expected to enhance the company’s resource base and operational efficiency, with potential implications for its market positioning and stakeholder value. The partnership with Topdrill allows Torque to manage costs effectively by settling part of the drilling expenses through equity, maintaining a strong cash position post-merger with Aston Minerals.

More about Torque Metals Ltd.

Torque Metals Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and development. Its primary project is the Paris Gold Project, where it aims to expand its gold resource through advanced drilling techniques and strategic partnerships.

data.title: Genscript Biotech’s ProBio Secures $213.8 Million from LaNova Licensing Deal
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Genscript Biotech ( (HK:1548) ) has provided an update.

Genscript Biotech Corporation announced that its subsidiary, ProBio, received approximately $213.8 million in payments under a licensing agreement with LaNova Medicines Ltd. This agreement grants LaNova an exclusive, worldwide license to develop and commercialize anti-PD-1 single domain antibodies. The payments, which include upfront and milestone payments, as well as sublicense revenue, will enhance ProBio’s cash reserves and strengthen its core competencies. The licensed antibodies demonstrate strong binding and tumor growth inhibition, comparable to Merck’s Keytruda, and have a favorable developability profile for manufacturing.

More about Genscript Biotech

Genscript Biotech Corporation, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operates in the biotechnology industry. The company, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on the development and commercialization of biotechnological products, including anti-PD-1 single domain antibodies, which are used for immunotherapy applications.

YTD Price Performance: 47.36%

data.title: Pacific Edge Limited Releases Annual Report Highlighting Global Expansion
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Pacific Edge Limited ( (PFGTF) ).

Pacific Edge Limited, a leader in bladder cancer diagnostics, has released its annual report for the year ended 31 March 2025. The report highlights the company’s continued focus on expanding its global reach and enhancing its diagnostic capabilities, which are crucial for patients with hematuria and for monitoring recurrent bladder cancer. This strategic positioning is expected to strengthen its market presence and provide significant benefits to stakeholders.

More about Pacific Edge Limited

Pacific Edge Limited is a global cancer diagnostics company specializing in the development and commercialization of bladder cancer diagnostic and prognostic tests. The company is headquartered in Dunedin, New Zealand, and is listed on the NZX and the ASX under the ticker code PEB. It provides its Cxbladder tests globally through its CLIA certified laboratories in New Zealand and the USA.
